findings.description: REF BOOK GET route parses sortBy, order, page, pageSize without zod validation (all other GET routes use zod schemas)
findings.remediation: Add refBookQuerySchema to refBook.validation.ts and apply safeParse in GET handler

findings.description: CSP script-src includes 'unsafe-eval' which allows eval() execution
findings.remediation: Remove 'unsafe-eval' in production build and use nonce-based CSP

findings.description: CORS Access-Control-Allow-Origin set to '*' allowing all origins
findings.remediation: Restrict to specific allowed origins via environment variable whitelist

findings.description: Mock JWT token is unsigned base64-encoded JSON (no cryptographic signature)
findings.remediation: Replace with Amazon Cognito or signed JWT (RS256/HS256) for production

findings.description: User auth info stored in localStorage (accessible via XSS)
findings.remediation: Switch to httpOnly cookie-based sessions for production

findings.description: console.error logs full error objects from Bedrock API (7 API routes). Client responses use generic messages.
findings.remediation: Use structured logger (Winston/Pino) with sensitive field filtering in production
Add HSTS header for production HTTPS deployment

production_notes: Implement real authentication (Amazon Cognito or OIDC) before production
Restrict CORS Access-Control-Allow-Origin to specific domains
Remove 'unsafe-eval' from CSP and switch to nonce-based policy
Add Strict-Transport-Security header for HTTPS deployment
Add rate limiting to API routes (especially Bedrock-calling endpoints)
Switch localStorage auth to httpOnly cookie sessions
Add zod validation to REF BOOK GET query parameters
Add prompt injection defense if user NOTAM input is introduced
Use parameterized queries when migrating from in-memory store to database
